summary: The user, JR, is the Senior Pastor at Westshore Christian Church and recently held an outreach event titled "Hope for the Holidays" to support individuals dealing with grief during the holiday season. During the event, JR shared personal experiences of loss, particularly the sudden death of his mother on August 11, 2020, and emphasized the importance of mourning and celebrating memories.
facts: JR is the Senior Pastor at Westshore Christian Church.
JR held an outreach event titled "Hope for the Holidays" to support people dealing with grief during the holidays.
JR's mother died suddenly on August 11, 2020, from a heart attack after being diagnosed with cancer.
JR served a church in New York at the time of his mother's diagnosis.
JR's mother lived in Virginia at the time of her death.
JR has a son named Zach.
JR is working on a book about grief dedicated to his mother.
JR emphasized that there is no right or wrong way to mourn during the event.
JR shared that he has been processing his grief for over two years since his mother's death.
JR's outreach event included prayer, discussion, and support for attendees.
JR quoted Ecclesiastes 3:1–8 during the event to illustrate the different times for mourning and celebration.
JR closed the event with a prayer focusing on comfort and strength during grief.
